rows.label: tev036001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Have you ever noticed how how cheerful Ma-non
are? They don't seem to have a problem being
stuck on this middle-of-nowhere planet, do they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0002
rows.name:
But I think we're kidding ourselves, don't
you? I mean, we may never be able to return
to to our homeworld again, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Anyway, the longer I stay on the ship, the sadder
I get. So I make a point to come down here and talk
to to Fraisie every day, if that makes sense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0004
rows.name:
The things she says, they... Well, I guess they
just fill some hole in my heart? I wish I could
share this feeling with with with everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0011
rows.name:
There's a water-purification plant right
there, but it's not enough to pump out the
amount of water a city this size needs, is it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Still, did you know that
there's a lake west of NLA
filled with fresh, clean water?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0013
rows.name:
If we could pipe that water into the
city somehow, I bet we could take care
of our hydration worries, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0016
rows.name:
Anyway, the human working over
at the purification plant was on
board with the idea, mostly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0017
rows.name:
I hope they're able to to get
started on construction without
any setbacks, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0034
rows.name:
Did you hear that they finished up
the new waterworks on Biahno Lake?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0035
rows.name:
I hear the Ma-non on the ship are also happy,
you know? Mostly because their relief supplies
now include a steady supply of of water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036001_MSG0036
rows.name:
We need water to live just
as much as you do, right?[ST:wait ]
